query:
-- Primero, identificar las versiones de la cotización
SELECT id, quotationNumber, versionNumber, createdAt 
FROM quotations 
WHERE quotationNumber LIKE '%1775675643251%' 
ORDER BY versionNumber DESC;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute 
-- Primero, identificar las versiones de la cotización
SELECT id, quotationNumber, versionNumber, createdAt 
FROM quotations 
WHERE quotationNumber LIKE '%1775675643251%' 
ORDER BY versionNumber DESC;
